steps.title: Compute the first mean
steps.content:
Data set X has sum $7+11+11+15=44$, so its mean is
$$
\frac{44}{4}=11
$$

steps.title: Compute the second mean
steps.content:
Data set Y adds $31$ to the same four values. Its sum is $44+31=75$, so its mean is
$$
\frac{75}{5}=15
$$

steps.title: Compare the means
steps.content: Since $11<15$, the mean of data set X is less than the mean of data set Y. The answer is B.
